test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsFallback_WhenBridgeReportsNoLegalAction
test-case.output: [TacticalAI] planning actor=team-0-slot-0 profile=Normal [TacticalAI] plan actor=team-0-slot-0 best=Skill skill=BattleCry target=team-1-slot-0 score=42.5 depth=3 fallbackCount=0 opponentResponse=covered

test-case.name: TryStartTurn_ReturnsStarted_WhenBridgeStartsAction
